reviews.review_title: How do I get rid of the ban?
reviews.review_description: Can You Tell Me How Do I Get Rid of It?

This is the best capuchin v1 copy (If you can call it that) this remaster of capuchin v1 is the best copy due to having capuchin v1 without stealing many assets (they say the player model is taken and I'm pretty sure capuchin devs/duttbust made that music ) oh yeah it also builds off of capuchin v1 by adding more updates like levels 3 and 4  (haven't gone there yet) my only complaint s is that they should redo the player model to make this game 99% free of stolen assets and THAT THERE IS NOBODY. A very good single player vr game indeed ( I'm being half sarcastic about that last sentance)

Honest review: the game itself is good but this game has so much potential. How the dev could have the game reach its potential is if it had more players 

SUGGESTION: make a discord server and put a link of it in the game and another suggestion is Try to promote it on a social media app like TikTok because TikTok is good for promoting products or yt shorts. The reason why its good to promote it is to get more players

developer_response.body: there is a discord and if anyones reading reviews here it is, https://discord.gg/2wSsDUeakj

reviews.review_description: skibidi game must get sigma creater🗿
